ma_deals.description: Mergers and acquisitions deal valuations and transaction data.
example_prompts: What was the total value of M&A deals last quarter?
Show me acquisition costs for 2024
How much did we spend on mergers and acquisitions in Q1 2025?
What is the total deal value for our M&A activity this year?

new_hires.description: Count of new employee hires within a time period.
example_prompts: How many people were hired this quarter?
What is our new hire count in Q1 2024?
Show me total hires for 2024
How many employees joined us last quarter?
What is our headcount growth this year?

headcount_low.description: FastLane headcount from HR records. Uses physical_table to query 'employees' directly on Supabase (Supabase only — ZK SlowLane always queries the 'transactions' table and does not support physical_table routing). timestamp_column must store UNIX epoch seconds.
example_prompts: How many employees were hired in Q1 2024?
What is the headcount for this quarter?
How many staff members joined in H1 2024?
What is our headcount growth this fiscal year?

avg_deal_size.description: ZK-verified average M&A deal size. Uses AVG composite evidence: two independent ZK proofs (SUM + COUNT) plus a BabyJubJub attestation for the division step.
example_prompts: What was the average deal size last quarter?
Show me average transaction value for Q1 2024
What is our mean deal value this fiscal year?
Average M&A transaction size in H1 2024
What is the typical deal size for our acquisitions this year?
